note: AUD5 fix for finding F-10 (docs/flowmap/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: test-authoring — the AUD3-missing spawn tests ARE the fix (T4). handoff-fresh already got its CLI deny tests in aud5/F-02.

intent.problem: AUD3 T4: gate.mjs was spawned by ZERO tests, and plan-check / plan-cert / flowmap-lint were tested fn-only — each script's argv parsing and exit wiring was mutation-blind (only internal logic was locked).
intent.approach: cli-wiring.test.mjs (in the suite): one thin spawn pair per gate — gate.mjs in-sync fixture -> 0, drifted fixture -> 1, no args -> 2; plan-check dangling-dep fixture -> 1, unreadable -> 2, real plan -> 0; plan-cert no --plan/unreadable -> 2 (good path already spawned by loop-e2e); flowmap-lint flat-mirror fixture -> 1, no path -> 2, real bundle -> 0.
intent.rationale: only a spawned CLI catches wiring mutations (the T4 lesson, already applied by F-04's roadmap suite); fixtures are self-contained temp files, no dependence on live repo state beyond the two real-artifact good paths.
